commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And he went up there to the inhabitants of Debir: and the name of Debir before was Kiriathsepher. Letters, as the Septuagint render it. Jerome adds this interpretation. (Haydock) It means literally "the city of the book. "Senna, may also mean "instruction "ver. Here probably a famous school was kept, before the arrival of the Israelites; or the archives of the nation might be deposited among these giants, as the Chaldean Kiriat-arche, "the city of the library, or archives "insinuates. (Bo chart, Phaleg.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
